risk_title: Security-driven work suspension affecting project completion
risk_summary: Construction and installation of four substations (40,000 kVA capacity) under Component 1 was halted due to security concerns as of August 15, 2021, delaying critical electrification infrastructure completion.
evidence_quote: The construction and installation of four substations with the total capacity of 40,000kVA under Component 1 was stopped from August 15, 2021 due to the security reason and is expected to be completed within 3 months when the work will be resumed.

risk_title: Political and governance instability affecting project implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risk category rated as 'High' at current assessment, indicating substantial fragility in the operating environment that constrains project execution.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating] Current Rating: High

risk_title: Suspension of IDA grant disbursements pending World Bank decision
risk_summary: Undisbursed IDA grants ($40.44M of $60M, representing 65% of total funding) remain suspended, indicating broader institutional or political concerns affecting project financing continuity.
evidence_quote: Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until further decision is made by the World Bank.
